item.title: Iraq to seek talks with Turkey on new oil transit deal
item.description: With the new government in place, Baghdad signals readiness to move fast to avoid new interruption to oil exports at the end of July

item.title: BP removes chairman with immediate effect
item.description: Supermajor said Albert Manifold removed from post following 'serious concerns raised to the board'

item.title: Shell starts drilling frontier exploration well off Egypt
item.description: All eyes on Velox-1X well in Herodotus basin

item.title: Constellation sees ‘promising outlook’ for rig demand in Brazil
item.description: Constellation chief executive talks to Upstream as Brazilian driller uplists stock on Euronext Oslo Bors marketplace

item.title: QatarEnergy further extends force majeure until mid-August for key LNG customer
item.description: Qatari state giant extends force majeure first introduced in March following Iranian drone attacks

item.title: Japanese contractor’s standardised FLNG design could knock more than year off delivery
item.description: JGC’s standardised floating liquefied natural gas package would utilise Honeywell’s technologies

item.title: Adnoc starts expansion push at major offshore development project
item.description: Adnoc earlier this month outlined plans to award $55 billion worth of projects from 2026 to 2028

item.title: State player teams up with Vitol for energy expansion drive
item.description: PetroVietnam says partnership aligns with its strategy of expanding into international markets

item.title: Petronas preparing for domestic drilling drive
item.description: Petronas Carigali lining on prospects offshore Sarawak and Peninsular Malaysia

item.title: MISC eyes selling assets and laying up vessels
item.description: Petronas subsidiary expects volatile operating environment to continue for marine and heavy engineering segment

item.title: Eni takes final investment decision on Baleine phase 3 offshore Ivory Coast
item.description: Oil production in country's largest discovery will more than double to 150,000 bpd

item.title: Kazakhstan will not seize Gazprom assets, says minister
item.description: Authorities in Astana denounce last week's court decision to recognise Ukraine's efforts to enforce last year's international arbitration award

item.title: ExxonMobil starts new exploration well in prolific Guyana block
item.description: US supermajor has already discovered about 11 billion barrels of oil equivalent in recoverable resources

item.title: Three dead in Petronas floater tragedy
item.description: Incident occurred Sunday during maintenance work aboard the Sepat floating storage and offloading vessel

item.title: State-owned operator unveils play opening gas discovery in producing basin
item.description: Rajasthan is home to India's largest producing onshore oil field, operated by private sector player Vedanta Oil & Gas

item.title: Contractor secures multimillion-dollar deal for Oman gas project
item.description: Project envisages boosting gas processing capacity at PDO’s Birba gas gathering station from 1.4 million to 4.2 million cubic metres per day

item.title: Multimillion-dollar deal awarded for Oman gas project
item.description: Project envisages boosting gas processing capacity at PDO’s Birba gas gathering station from 1.4 million to 4.2 million cubic metres per day

item.title: Aussie junior eyes LNG to commercialise gas asset being acquired from Santos
item.description: FID on horizon for Mahalo gas project, which is also expected to deliver volumes to Australia’s east coast

item.title: South Korean offshore giants enter annual wage bargaining talks
item.description: Workers are demanding performance bonuses tied to operating profits amid quarterly increase

item.title: Fresh bidding deadline nears for much-delayed Qatar offshore megaproject
item.description: QatarEnergy is carrying out a multibillion-dollar redevelopment programme at the Maydan Mahzam oilfield, but its bidding process has been delayed by several months, amid ongoing disruption at the Strait of Hormuz

item.title: Tuna suspended as Harbour works to complete asset sales
item.description: UK company working hard to complete sale to Indonesia's Prime Group

item.title: ExxonMobil blasts critics of Texas relocation, automatic voting programme
item.description: US supermajor takes shots at ISS and Glass Lewis, which are telling shareholders to vote against the move

item.title: Brazil sets clock for next two oil and gas bid rounds
item.description: Brazil government to offer acreage in pre-salt and post-salt horizons

item.title: Lessons from Mexico's 'oil revolution' sound cautionary note for Venezuela
item.description: Promises of new opportunities coming to Venezuela echo the Mexican oil and gas revolution that never was

item.title: Subsea7 wins offshore deal for Norway gas export project
item.description: Contractor wins work for Vaar Energi and Equinor’s Goliat Gas Export effort in Barents Sea

item.title: On the right track: Eni makes big gas discovery in Egypt's Western Desert
item.description: Bostan-1X exploration well hit 400 feet of net pay

item.title: Lenders line up to finance Eni CCS projects
item.description: Italian major's CCS-focused satellite secured £500 million from leading banks

item.title: New UK North Sea oilfield due on stream imminently
item.description: Operator updates on Teal West and Greater Marigold projects

item.title: ExxonMobil signs deal to assess exporting Cypriot gas to Egypt
item.description: US supermajor, QatarEnergy and Cairo government sign MoU to assess viability of sending gas from Glaucus and Pegasus discoveries to North Africa nation

item.title: Kazakh project maintenance shutdown under review amid high prices
item.description: Maintenance shutdown at Kashagan offshore oilfield would remove 400,000 bpd of oil from international markets in June
